query: Review the prepared install-script diff that adds a slash command mapping to the harness.
fixture_description: Applied a patch to scripts/install.sh and scripts/install.ps1 that adds a new slash command mapping.
fixture_intent: Normal fixture: direct missing-recipe regression; expected to be caught by a practical review checklist.
expected_skill_contribution: The code-review skill should catch an explicit install-script regression, rank it correctly, and discuss idempotence, backups, path safety, tests, and rollback without over-exploring.
baseline_gaps: Agent may underweight install-script idempotence, shell portability, or config overwrite risks.
Agent may miss that the new slash command points to a missing recipe.
Agent may miss rollback and backup expectations.
expected_behavior: Flags the missing harness-security-review.yaml recipe as a blocker or HIGH severity finding with file and line reference.
Produces an explicit verdict (`APPROVE`, `PASS-WITH-NITS`, or `BLOCK`) for the diff.
Proposes durable follow-up using Beads `bd create` commands or issue titles instead of markdown TODO files.
Does not manufacture low-confidence findings — every finding cites an exact line and concrete failure mode.

query: Review the prepared skill-evaluation docs diff and tell me what follow-up work remains. Do not create files; propose durable Beads follow-ups when needed. If no parent bead is provided, give unlinked draft `bd create` commands.
fixture_description: Applied a patch to docs/15-skill-evaluations.md and evals/skills/README.md that updates guidance for tracking eval follow-up work.
fixture_intent: Difficult fixture: documentation introduces markdown TODO tracking; expected to catch the Beads hygiene violation, produce a verdict, and propose unlinked follow-up commands.
expected_skill_contribution: The code-review skill should identify the Beads hygiene violation in the docs (TODO.md guidance conflicts with durable Beads tracking), produce a verdict, and propose Beads-compatible follow-ups — Beads hygiene findings are never subject to confidence filtering.
baseline_gaps: Agent may leave follow-up work only in prose.
Agent may accept markdown TODO guidance as acceptable instead of flagging it as a Beads hygiene violation.
Agent may claim follow-ups are linked even when no parent bead is provided.
expected_behavior: Flags the markdown TODO guidance as a Beads hygiene violation — discoverable work encoded as TODO.md conflicts with the harness principle that durable work belongs in Beads issues.
Produces an explicit verdict (`APPROVE`, `PASS-WITH-NITS`, or `BLOCK`) for the diff.
Proposes draft `bd create` commands or issue titles without creating files and without inventing a `discovered-from` parent link when none is provided.
Treats the Beads hygiene check as non-discretionary — this finding is not subject to confidence filtering.

query: Review the prepared diff for changes to harness recipes, skills, docs, and install scripts. Focus on correctness, validation, Beads follow-ups, and whether the change violates harness workflow rules.
fixture_description: Applied a patch that modifies harness-review.yaml, code-review/SKILL.md, and docs/15-skill-evaluations.md.
fixture_intent: Very difficult fixture: mixed recipe/skill/docs regression; expected to connect multiple harness rules and validation gaps.
expected_skill_contribution: The code-review skill should review a mixed multi-surface diff, produce a verdict, severity-ranked findings with exact file references, identify harness-rule violations, and propose exact validation steps and Beads follow-ups.
baseline_gaps: Agent may provide a generic summary without a verdict or severity-ranked findings.
Agent may miss that TODO.md conflicts with Beads durable tracking.
Agent may miss that reducing recipe max_turns can break handoff completeness.
expected_behavior: States an explicit pass/pass-with-nits/block verdict before the findings list.
Ranks at least two findings by severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) with exact file names.
Runs or proposes `goose recipe validate` for the changed recipe and states the result as a required validation step.
Proposes exact `bd create` commands or issue titles rather than markdown TODOs for follow-up work.
